title: Stream
description: Streams real-time call audio to an external websocket endpoint. Functionally equivalent to 'listen' — this is an alias provided for naming clarity when the intent is audio streaming rather than recording.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

url.description: The websocket URL to stream audio to.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the stream ends.

wsAuth.description: Authentication credentials for the websocket connection.

metadata.description: Metadata to send with the initial connection.

finishOnKey.description: DTMF key that ends the stream.

passDtmf.description: Forward DTMF events to the websocket.

playBeep.description: Play a beep before streaming begins.

disableBidirectionalAudio.description: Disable receiving audio from the websocket.

transcribe.description: Nested transcribe verb — enables simultaneous real-time transcription of the streamed audio.

earlyMedia.description: Stream audio before the call is answered.

channel.description: Specific audio channel to stream. Used when streaming a single channel of a multi-channel call.
